title: Design reviewed worktree cleanup apply path
goal: Define and implement a guarded cleanup path for worktree-hygiene candidates without deleting worktrees from a report alone.

metadata.source: Registered after PR #253 intentionally shipped worktree-hygiene as read-only only.
metadata.safety_boundary: Cleanup must be reviewed, path-scoped, branch-aware, dirty-state-protected and reversible where possible.

acceptance.assertion: Apply mode accepts only explicit candidate paths from a reviewed plan, not all hygiene findings.
Dirty or missing worktrees are refused unless a separate force boundary is designed and reviewed.
Cleanup never deletes a branch without explicit branch deletion evidence and review.
After cleanup, worktree-hygiene emits a fresh post-clean report.
